legal.title: Legal
legal.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using 248 Snooker.

terms_sections.title: Service Description
terms_sections.body: 248 Snooker is operated by FORM, offering Hong Kong’s first 24-hour self-service English snooker booking platform.

terms_sections.title: Booking Terms
terms_sections.body: Each user may hold up to 2 active bookings. Each table seats up to 2 players, allocated first-come, first-served.

terms_sections.title: Entry Rules
terms_sections.body: A valid QR code is required for entry. Arriving more than 15 minutes late forfeits the booking. QR codes are non-transferable.

terms_sections.title: House Rules
terms_sections.body: No smoking, gambling, or outside food. Please respect the equipment — violations result in cancellation without refund.

terms_sections.title: Payment Terms
terms_sections.body: All fees are in HKD. We accept credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Alipay, and WeChat Pay.

terms_sections.title: Overtime
terms_sections.body: Overtime is charged at HK$50 per 15 minutes, deducted automatically from your registered card.

terms_sections.title: Points Programme
terms_sections.body: Earn 1 point per HK$10 spent. Points hold no cash value and expire after 24 months.

terms_sections.title: Disclaimer
terms_sections.body: 248 Snooker is not liable for any loss of property or personal injury.

terms_sections.title: Governing Law
terms_sections.body: These terms are governed by and construed under the laws of the Hong Kong SAR.

privacy_sections.title: Data We Collect
privacy_sections.body: We collect your name, email, phone, payment details, booking history, and CCTV footage.

privacy_sections.title: How We Use It
privacy_sections.body: To process bookings, send notifications, manage points, and improve our service.

privacy_sections.title: Third-Party Services
privacy_sections.body: We use Stripe, Google, Supabase, Resend, and WhatsApp.

privacy_sections.title: Data Retention
privacy_sections.body: CCTV footage is kept for up to 31 days. Payment data is handled and stored by Stripe.

privacy_sections.title: Your Rights
privacy_sections.body: You may access, correct, or delete your data by contacting info.formhk@gmail.com.

privacy_sections.title: Cookies
privacy_sections.body: By continuing to use this site, you consent to our use of cookies.

rules_notes: CCTV monitors the venue at all times

aboutPage.mission_statement: Give every snooker lover a home court to call their own.

mission_items.title: Pro Equipment
mission_items.body: Standard English snooker tables, re-clothed monthly.

mission_items.title: Always Open
mission_items.body: 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

mission_items.title: Tech Experience
mission_items.body: Book in 3 seconds, enter with a QR code.

aboutPage.story_body: 248 Snooker began with a simple belief: a great snooker venue shouldn’t be bound by opening hours. We reimagined the experience with technology so you can book your own table anytime, anywhere, in one tap. From booking to payment to entry, it’s fully self-service — no waiting. This is your home court.

memberPage.delete_confirm: Delete your account? This cannot be undone.
memberPage.settings_err_phone: Enter a valid Hong Kong phone number.

nav.sign_out_error: Couldn't sign out. Please try again.

how.title: How It Works
how.step1_body: Choose date, time, and duration. Instant confirmation.
how.step1_modal_body: Book entirely online in three steps. Choose your date, time, and duration — confirmation is instant, no waiting for a human reply. Pay with Apple Pay, Visa, Mastercard, or UnionPay.
how.step2_body: Get your QR code instantly. Scan at the door. Auto-unlock.
how.step2_modal_body: Once confirmed, you receive a unique QR code valid for your session window. Scan the door lock on arrival — it unlocks automatically. No staff needed at any point.
how.step3_body: HK$1 = 1 point. The more you play, the more you save.
how.step3_modal_body: Earn 1 point per HK$1 spent, with automatic tier upgrades. Three tiers — Amateur, Century, Maximum — unlock discounts, priority booking, and free coaching sessions.

member.title: Membership
member.amateur_body: HK$1 = 1 point. Start with 50 bonus points.
member.amateur_modal_body: New users join Amateur automatically and receive 50 bonus points. Earn 1 point per HK$1 spent — a great starting point.
member.century_body: 10% off all sessions. Priority booking. 1.5× point multiplier.
member.century_modal_body: Reach 500 points to unlock Century tier. Enjoy 10% off all sessions, priority access to peak evening slots, and earn points 1.5× faster.
member.maximum_body: 20% off all sessions. Reserved table access. 2× points, free coaching.
member.maximum_modal_body: Reach 1,500 points for Maximum status. 20% off all sessions, reserved table access, double point accumulation, and complimentary coaching sessions — for the most dedicated players.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.faq_booking_q: How do I book a table?
faq.faq_booking_a: Select a date, time slot, and duration, then pay instantly with Apple Pay or a credit card. You'll receive a QR code immediately. No staff assistance required.
faq.faq_entry_q: How do I enter after booking?
faq.faq_entry_a: After payment, you'll receive a unique QR code. Scan the door sensor on arrival and the system unlocks automatically — fully self-service.
faq.faq_cancel_a: You can cancel for free up to 2 hours before your session starts and receive a full refund. Cancellations after that are non-refundable.
faq.faq_hours_a: 248 Snooker Club is open 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, including public holidays.
faq.faq_minimum_q: What is the minimum booking duration?
faq.faq_minimum_a: The minimum is 1 hour. You can book 1, 2, or 3 hours.
faq.faq_pricing_a: Afternoon (12pm–6pm) and late night (12am–6am) are HK$60/hr. Evening (6pm–12am) is HK$80/hr.
faq.faq_points_q: How does the points system work?
faq.faq_points_a: Earn 1 point per HK$1 spent. Reach 500 points for Century tier (10% off, 1.5× points). Reach 1,500 for Maximum tier (20% off, free coaching).
faq.faq_facilities_a: Professional snooker tables, premium lighting, air conditioning, free Wi-Fi, and a self-serve drinks area.
faq.faq_guests_a: Yes, each session can accommodate multiple players. The session fee covers everyone — no extra charge per person.
faq.faq_contact_a: Reach us via WhatsApp or email hello@formhk.com — we'll get back to you promptly.
